conversation.content: Let's learn about an animal protection regulation. Today we are going to understand the Nagrand Wildlife Protection Law in the world of Azeroth, which places strict restrictions on hunters' behaviors.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.

The core rule of this law is: those who hunt elek calves without permission will be fined 300 gold coins per head, have their hunting gear confiscated, and simultaneously have their hunting license permanently revoked; if adult eleks are hunted, the fine is 150 gold coins per head.
I have written down the core penalty standards of this law.
The application scenario of this rule is the Nagrand grasslands and all hunting areas.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this rule.
